As AI and data become central to digital transformation mandates across financial services, government, and energy sectors in Africa, this role establishes KPMG T
requirements: Degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Mathematics, Statistics, or related quantitative discipline.
Cloud data platform certification required: Azure Data Engineer (DP-203), AWS Data Analytics, or Databricks Certified Data Engineer.
AI/ML certification preferred: Azure AI Engineer (AI-102), AWS Machine Learning Specialty, or Google Professional ML Engineer.
Minimum 8 years of experience in data engineering, analytics, or AI/ML, with at least 4 years in a client-facing architecture or consulting role.
Proven experience designing and delivering data platform migrations, analytics programmes, or AI/ML deployments for enterprise clients.

requirements: Degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or related technical discipline.

jobs.title: ICT Program Director Job Ericsson
jobs.description: We are now looking for a well-rounded and Senior Program Director to drive the delivery of 5G and 4G Core and Cloud solutions! You will be delivering the latest technology in a highly dynamic, fast-paced, competitive, and challenging multi-vendor environment.

Build strong internal and external relationships
Harvest and optimize best practices, create and share knowledge assets to industrialize delivery processes
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Computer Science, or related field.
Minimum 6 years of experience as Program Manager, including Core and Cloud delivery
Experience delivering physical, virtualized, and containerized Network Function projects
Expertise in automating test and deployment processes
Experience to Support sales teams to drive new business opportunities.

jobs.title: Senior Support Staff – ICT Job Pwani Oil
responsibilities: ICT Support & Service Delivery: Deliver first and second-level technical support, ensuring timely resolution of hardware, software, system, and network-related issues while maintaining high user satisfaction.
Network & Infrastructure Management: Support and maintain LAN/WAN, Wi-Fi, servers, storage, backup systems, and end-user devices to ensure reliable and secure ICT operations.
Incident & Problem Resolution: Manage incidents from identification to closure, maintain accurate documentation, and drive root cause analysis to minimize recurring issues.
Hardware, Software & Asset Administration: Oversee installation, configuration, maintenance, upgrades, security compliance, and lifecycle management of ICT assets and applications.
Systems, Data & Security Support: Administer user accounts, access rights, backups, enterprise applications, and ensure adherence to ICT security policies and data protection standards.

User Training & Continuous Improvement: Conduct user training, develop technical documentation, prepare performance reports, and support ICT projects, system upgrades, and service enhancement initiatives.
requirements: Diploma or Degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Networking, or a related field.
Strong understanding of networking, operating systems, hardware, software, and ICT infrastructure.
Experience in ICT support, troubleshooting, and service desk operations.
Knowledge of LAN/WAN environments, Wi-Fi technologies, endpoint security, and backup systems.
Ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues efficiently.

jobs.title: Dean – School of ICT, Media & Engineering Job Zetech University
jobs.company: School of ICT, Media & Engineering Job Zetech University
jobs.description: The position-holders will primarily be employed as a teaching staff on permanent and pensionable terms, but will hold the Dean of School position on a three-year renewable contract. They will be reporting to the DVC-Academics, Research and Student Affairs and will be responsible for:
responsibilities: Strategic planning for the School.
Overseeing teaching and evaluation, ensuring timely, up-to-standard and comprehensive course coverage and integrity of examinations.
Overseeing class attendance by students and staff.
Planning for, allocation, management and optimal use of resources, including human and physical resources.
Ensuring the sustainability of the School through student retention, cohort completion, progression rates and growth of student population.
Leading and inspiring research and innovation in the School.
requirements: A minimum of a relevant PhD, Masters and Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology/ Computer Science/ Information Technology/Software Engineering/ Data Science/ Engineering/Educational Technology or a relevant field from an accredited and recognised University;
At least 3 years of teaching/research experience at the University level as a Lecturer/ Research Fellow;
Has evidence of publications as a Lecturer/Research Fellow;

Has demonstrable leadership and administrative experience. Experience as a Head or Chair of Department, programme leader, postgraduate coordinator or other relevant management experience will be highly considered;
Supervised at least two (2) postgraduate students to completion;

jobs.title: Data Analyst – Sales Job Royal Mabati
jobs.description: The Sales Data Analyst is responsible for collecting, analyzing, and interpreting sales and business data to support strategic decision-making and drive commercial performance. The role focuses on transforming raw data into meaningful insights through reporting, dashboards, and trend analysis to enhance sales effectiveness, operational efficiency, and business growth.
responsibilities: Collect, clean, and analyze structured and unstructured data from multiple sources to support business operations and sales performance tracking.
Generate accurate reports, dashboards, and visualizations using tools such as Advanced Excel, Power BI, and Tableau to support business intelligence needs.
Identify trends, patterns, and correlations in sales and operational data, and provide actionable insights and recommendations to support data-driven decision-making.
Utilize Advanced Excel techniques, including PivotTables, Power Query, complex formulas, and macros, for data analysis, reporting, and process improvement.
Write and optimize SQL queries to retrieve, manipulate, and validate data efficiently.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams including Sales, Finance, Production, and Management to understand business requirements and deliver tailored analytical solutions.
requirements: Education: Bachelor’s degree in Data Science, Statistics, Business Analytics, Information Technology, Computer Science, Economics, or a related field.
Experience: At least 3-5 years’ experience in data analysis, sales analytics, business intelligence, or a related analytical role.
jobs.howToApply: Send your cv to:hr@royalmabati.comDeadline Friday, 12th June, 2026

jobs.title: NET Application Development Engineer Job Cigna
responsibilities: To strengthen our IT department we are currently looking for a passionate .NET Application Development Engineer to join our Team, a self-organized, cross functional team in the IGO/NGO Release Train within Cigna’s International Markets. Together with the team, you will take ownership of its supported applications, continuously improving and extending them and making sure they keep running smoothly in the production environment (“You build it, you run it.”)

You are customer oriented while keeping performance in mind. You keep an overall view on all components of the applications in the scrum teams portfolio and know how to find the right balance between future-proof solutions and fast-to-market requirements. You have a business drive, passion for technology and are eager to learn. Above all, you have a can-do attitude where you roll up your sleeves and just do it.

As a .NET Application Development Engineer, you will contribute to the design, development, and ongoing support of backend applications that power Cigna’s claims processes. Working within a cross‑functional Agile team, you will play a key role in building high-performing, reliable solutions while continuously learning and growing in a dynamic environment.
requirements: NET development (C#) and MS SQL
Software development lifecycle (SDLC) principles
Backend architecture and design
Version control tools (Git / TFS)
Familiarity with DevOps and CI/CD tools (e.g., Azure DevOps Pipelines)
jobs.howToApply: Click Here to Apply
